# Vibe Check: Cursor 3.0 Bets Big on Agent Orchestration

**From:** Every <hello@every.to>
**Date:** 2026-04-02

Vibe Check: Cursor 3.0 Bets Big on Agent Orchestration 




The AI-native IDE is now becoming an agent-orchestration tool. Will it work?
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

|  |
| --- |
| [Vibe Check](https://every.) [Vibe Check: Cursor 3.0 Bets Big on Agent Orchestration](https://every.) [The AI-native IDE is now becoming an agent-orchestration tool. Will it work?](https://every.) by [Dan Shipper](https://every.), [Katie Parrott](https://every.), and [Mike Taylor](https://every.)     Midjourney/Every illustration.  *Was this newsletter forwarded to you? [Sign up](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2FjY291bnQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6N30=) to get it in your inbox.*     ---     Cursor made its name as the AI-native code editor—the product that proved developers wanted AI inside their workflow. With Cursor 3.0, out today, the company is making a big bet on what comes next—and it’s not editing code.  The new release is a ground-up rebuild centered on agent orchestration: dispatching, monitoring, and managing AI agents rather than writing code by hand. The editor is still there, but it’s no longer the star—the default view opens on an agent-centered workspace, with a chat-driven orchestration panel where the file tree used to be. It’s fast, resource-light, and has a genuinely impressive cloud feature that lets an agent build a feature while you grab coffee, then sends you a screencast demo when it’s done.  The problem is that the orchestration layer hasn’t earned the right to take center stage yet. The filesystem sidebar has been demoted to another tab. The skills ecosystem is fragmented across Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor with no interoperability. And the core question our team kept circling back to—“Who is this for?”—doesn’t have a satisfying answer yet.  Power users who already live in Claude Code or Codex don’t need another orchestration layer. Cursor loyalists who loved the editor are losing prominence for the thing they came for. Their team seems to be iterating incredibly fast, so we’ll be paying attention over the coming weeks and months as this becomes clearer.  We spent a week testing it with four members of Every’s engineering and product team. Here’s what we found.  [Read the full Vibe Check](https://every.)     ---     [Uploaded image](https://every.) **AI-native database** Don’t let legacy databases hold you back. Traditional databases were designed for neat rows and columns, but AI applications generate unstructured data. MongoDB Atlas natively handles JSON-like unstructured data with the flexibility to store, query, and scale diverse datasets without rigid schemas. Plus, with native vector search, horizontal auto-scaling, and multi-cloud deployment, it’s the only modern database that adapts to how AI actually works.  [Try MongoDB Atlas free](https://every.) Click here](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJtYWlsdG86c3BvbnNvcnNoaXBzQGV2ZXJ5LnRvIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjExfQ==).  ***[Dan Shipper](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BkYW5zaGlwcGVyIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEyfQ==)*** *is the cofounder and CEO of Every, where he writes the* *[Chain of Thought](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2NoYWluLW9mLXRob3VnaHQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTN9)* *column and hosts the podcast* [AI & I](https://every.). *You can follow him on X at* *[@danshipper](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3R3aXR0ZXIuY29tL2RhbnNoaXBwZXIiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTV9)* *and on* *[LinkedIn](https://every.).* ***[Katie Parrott](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BrYXRpZS5wYXJyb3R0MTIiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTd9)*** *is a staff writer and AI editorial lead at Every. You can read more of her work in* *[her newsletter](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2thdGllcGFycm90dC5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjE4fQ==).* ***[Mike Taylor](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BtaWtlXzIxMTQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTl9)*** *is the head of tech consulting at Every and a co-author of* [Prompt Engineering for Generative AI](https://every.)*. You can follow him on X at* *[@hammer\_mt](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3guY29tL2hhbW1lcl9tdCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyMX0=)* *and on* *[LinkedIn](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5saW5rZWRpbi5jb20vaW4vbWp0MTQ1LyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyMn0=).*  *To read more essays like this, subscribe to [Every](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3N1YnNjcmliZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyM30=), and follow us on X at [@every](https://every.to/emails/click/647c862f45c0c6db733d6c802c5f7a124a4e4285f5493056ed476fde93921470/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVmliZSBDaGVjazogQ3Vyc29yIDMuMCBCZXRzIEJpZyBvbiBBZ2VudCBPcmNoZXN0cmF0aW9uICIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTEsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwOi8vdHdpdHRlci5jb20vZXZlcnkiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MjR9) and on [LinkedIn](https://every.).*  *We also do AI training, adoption, and innovation for companies.
